cost_proxy.description: Derived geometry-complexity proxy. It is useful for cost-aware policy mechanics but is not observed CFD runtime.

evidence.proxy_formula: 1 + minmax_norm(norm(train-independent geometry descriptor distance from median))

geometry_heldout.confidence_method: mean, sample standard deviation, standard error, normal 95% CI

map_completion.confidence_method: mean, sample standard deviation, standard error, normal 95% CI
